title: OGI Bio Bung Cleaning
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c94pb","text":"The protocol for the cleaning and sterilization of your OGI BioReactor silicon bungs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"f5tov","text":"Bungs should be cleaned immediately after an experiment to prevent fouling in the needles due to dry culture.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"653u5","text":"Take care not to bend the Media/Waste bung needles, as they are carefully designed to fit standard 500 mL Duran bottles.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"88nm4","text":"Ensure you have familiarised yourself with the guidelines and warnings for this protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4jtg1","text":"Take care when handling the bungs as, while care is taken to ensure no cutting edges are left, the needles can be sharp.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: As soon after running an experiment as possible, using a small piece of 1 mm ID tubing, flush both Source (S) and Drain (D) needles with ethanol to prevent debris buildup.

As the needles are sharp, double-bag the bungs in paper autoclave bags. Steribags Head Seal Closure Pouches (Autoclave Bag, Synergy Healthcare, 15671944, https://www.fishersci.se/shop/products/steribags-heat-seal-closure-pouches-4/15671944 )
Autoclave at the preferred temperature. The bungs are temperature-safe up to 250°C.
Bungs should not be removed from their autoclave bags unless under sterile conditions.
If using, flush the needle of the Waste flask bung with ethanol.
creator: Jack Hocking
